untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of specific continuation patterns (triangles, flags, pennants, wedges) and assessment of pattern size/importance. These geometric pattern recognition features are not available in the allowed indicator set. The signal is qualitative and pattern-detection based, requiring visual/algorithmic chart pattern recognition beyond technical indicators. Provided a proxy using ADX (trend strength) + price/SMA positioning as a trend-following approximation, but this does not capture the actual pattern logic.
translation_notes: KAUFMAN rule describes continuation patterns within trends. Since pattern detection indicators are unavailable, translation uses ADX_14 > 25 to confirm strong trend, combined with price position relative to SMA_50 to determine trend direction. Exit occurs when price crosses below/above SMA_50 (trend failure). This is a simplified trend-following approximation and does NOT properly implement the original pattern-based signal. A proper implementation would require custom pattern detection logic outside the standard indicator set.
